---
title: "Function reference"
---

All functions and classes exported by flixpatrol.

## Functions

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [`authenticate()`](reference/authenticate.qmd) | Authenticate and Create Base Request |
| [`compare_platforms_tbl()`](reference/compare_platforms_tbl.qmd) | Compare a Title's Ranking Across Platforms |
| [`fetch_fans_ranking_tbl()`](reference/fetch_fans_ranking_tbl.qmd) | Fetch Fans Site Rankings |
| [`flixpatrol_options()`](reference/flixpatrol_options.qmd) | FlixPatrol Package Options |
| [`fp_cache_ids()`](reference/fp_cache_ids.qmd) | Cache Country and Platform IDs to Lookup Tables |
| [`fp_enrich()`](reference/fp_enrich.qmd) | Enrich a Tibble with Resolved Names |
| [`get_company_name()`](reference/get_company_name.qmd) | Get Company Name from ID |
| [`get_franchise_name()`](reference/get_franchise_name.qmd) | Get Franchise Name from ID |
| [`get_franchise_performance()`](reference/get_franchise_performance.qmd) | Franchise Performance Rollup |
| [`get_global_ranking()`](reference/get_global_ranking.qmd) | Global Ranking for a Title Across Countries |
| [`get_hours_viewed()`](reference/get_hours_viewed.qmd) | Create Hours Viewed Table |
| [`get_official_ranking()`](reference/get_official_ranking.qmd) | Create Official Ranking Table |
| [`get_premieres()`](reference/get_premieres.qmd) | Create Premiere Table |
| [`get_social_fans()`](reference/get_social_fans.qmd) | Create Social Fans Table |
| [`get_title_details()`](reference/get_title_details.qmd) | Get Title Details |
| [`get_title_history()`](reference/get_title_history.qmd) | Track a Single Title's Rank Over Time |
| [`get_title_name()`](reference/get_title_name.qmd) | Get Name from FlixPatrol ID |
| [`get_top_ten()`](reference/get_top_ten.qmd) | Create a Daily Top 10 Table for a Date Range |
| [`get_top_titles_summary()`](reference/get_top_titles_summary.qmd) | Summarize Top Titles Over a Date Range |
| [`get_torrent_ranking()`](reference/get_torrent_ranking.qmd) | Create Torrent Ranking Table |
| [`get_weekly_movers()`](reference/get_weekly_movers.qmd) | Weekly Movers: Gainers, Losers, New Entries, and Exits |
| [`lookup_country()`](reference/lookup_country.qmd) | Lookup Country IDs |
| [`lookup_date_type()`](reference/lookup_date_type.qmd) | Lookup Date Type IDs |
| [`lookup_flix_type()`](reference/lookup_flix_type.qmd) | Lookup Flix Type IDs |
| [`lookup_franchise()`](reference/lookup_franchise.qmd) | Lookup Franchise IDs |
| [`lookup_from_table()`](reference/lookup_from_table.qmd) | Lookup Values from a Reference Table |
| [`lookup_language()`](reference/lookup_language.qmd) | Lookup Language IDs |
| [`lookup_media_type()`](reference/lookup_media_type.qmd) | Lookup Media Type IDs |
| [`lookup_platform()`](reference/lookup_platform.qmd) | Lookup Platform (Company) IDs |
| [`lookup_title()`](reference/lookup_title.qmd) | Lookup Title ID |
| [`lookup_torrent_site()`](reference/lookup_torrent_site.qmd) | Lookup Torrent Site IDs |
| [`unnest_flixpatrol_response()`](reference/unnest_flixpatrol_response.qmd) | Unnest a FlixPatrol API Response |
| [`validate_date_range()`](reference/validate_date_range.qmd) | Validate Date Ranges for API Compatibility |
